words.def: a cunning or deceitful action or device
words.zh: n. 詭計, 欺詐, 謀略, 惡作劇, 習慣, 決竅

words.def: a painful muscle spasm especially in the neck or back (`rick' and `wrick' are British)

words.zh: n. 滴答聲, 一瞬間, 壁蝨, 褥套, 信用, 賒欠

words.def: a case for containing a set of articles
words.zh: n. 裝備, 工具箱, 成套工具
